name: Claude 2.1
tagline: Added a 200K context window and reduced hallucination rates over Claude 2.
metaDescription: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic), released 2023-11-21 — part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Added a 200K context window and reduced hallucination rates over Claude 2…
overview: Claude 2.1 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Released 2023-11-21. Anthropic's pre-Claude-3 models, including the original Claude and the low-latency Claude Instant; all retired.
What's notable in this version: Added a 200K context window and reduced hallucination rates over Claude 2. Retired 2025-07-21.
